Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, long(null), 3 ] | extend g=iif(isnull(x), "n", "v") | summarize s=sum(x), c=count(), cx=count(x), mn=min(x) by g | order by g asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(*) AS cx, MIN(x) AS mn FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN (x IS NULL) THEN 'n' ELSE 'v' END AS g FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Sql: SELECT a, b, c, d, e FROM (SELECT *, COALESCE(a, b, (-1)) AS c, CASE WHEN a > b THEN a ELSE b END AS d, CASE WHEN (a IS NULL) THEN b WHEN (b IS NULL) THEN a ELSE a + b END AS e FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT), CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(a, b)) ORDER BY c ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abc", "", "x" ] | extend n=tostring(dynamic(null)) | summarize ml=make_list(n), ms=make_set(s), cn=countif(isnull(n)), ce=countif(isempty(n))
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(n) FILTER (WHERE n IS NOT NULL), []) AS ml, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ms, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (n IS NULL)) AS cn, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (n IS NULL OR CAST(n AS VARCHAR) = '')) AS ce FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS n FROM (VALUES ('abc'), (''), ('x')) AS t(s))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "O'Brien", "a\"b", "tab\ttab", "" ] | extend l=strlen(s), u=toupper(s), sub=substring(s, 1, 100), c=countof(s, "b") | project s, l, u, sub, c
Sql: SELECT s, l, u, sub, c FROM (SELECT *, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS l, UPPER(s) AS u, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (1) + 1, 100) AS sub, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'b', ''))) / LENGTH('b') AS c FROM (VALUES ('O''Brien'), ('a\"b'), ('tab\ttab'), ('')) AS t(s))
Detail: first differing row[1]: kusto=('a"b', 3, 'A"B', '"b', 1) duck=('a\"b', 4, 'A\"B', '\"b', 1)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 2147483648, -2147483649, long(null) ] | extend i=toint(x), back=tolong(toint(x)) | project x, i, back | order by x asc nulls last
Sql: SELECT x, i, back FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS i, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS back FROM (VALUES (CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(-2147483649 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) ORDER BY x DESC NULLS LAST
